title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Project Status Reporting — 5 Skills for Stakeholder Communication and Risk Visibility
description: For project managers and engineering leads, this pack generates weekly status reports, RAG status summaries, risk and blocker escalations, milestone progress narratives, and executive briefing snapshots so they can keep every stakeholder aligned without spending hours writing updates
gumroad_description:
You're spending 3-4 hours every week writing status reports that half your stakeholders won't read anyway.

Stop. This pack gives you five Claude skills that write your status updates for you—and they actually tell your story instead of drowning in details.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Engineering leads managing 5-10 person teams who need weekly visibility without becoming full-time documenters
— Project managers juggling multiple concurrent projects and different stakeholder communication styles
— Technical directors who need RAG status precision and early risk escalation, not surprises in steering meetings

WHAT'S INSIDE

— Weekly status report generator (narrative structure, measurable progress, blockers highlighted)
— RAG status summarizer (Red/Amber/Green quick pulse checks for leadership dashboards)
— Risk and blocker escalation skill (catches what matters, flags urgency correctly)
— Milestone progress narrative (shows momentum and completion trajectory to executives)
— Executive briefing snapshot (2-minute read that gets the decision-makers what they need)

Drop these into your Claude skills folder. They're ready to use immediately.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
